description: Capture an approved PayPal order to complete payment

request_payload.note: Request body is typically empty for full capture. Include payment_source for partial capture scenarios.

v5_client_side_pattern.note: In v5, capture can happen client-side in onApprove callback

v6_server_side_pattern.note: In v6, capture MUST happen server-side. Client calls your server from onApprove, server calls PayPal API

v6: 5. Client handles result (redirect to success page)

important_notes: Order must be in APPROVED status before capture
Capture is final — cannot be undone (use refund instead)
Capture ID from response is needed for future refunds
Use PayPal-Request-Id for idempotent retry safety
Always verify capture status server-side before fulfillment

error_codes.ORDER_NOT_APPROVED: Buyer has not yet approved the order
error_codes.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR: PayPal internal error — retry with idempotency key
error_codes.UNPROCESSABLE_ENTITY: Order cannot be captured in its current state
